raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirming a set of personal communication principles and boundaries through declarative self-description",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker possesses or enacts clarity and coherence in communication",
    "the speaker maintains personal integrity without self-diminishment while speaking",
    "the speaker maintains separateness of perspective while listening",
    "the speaker possesses a defined threshold for exiting interactions based on truth-honoring"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; each clause presents a parallel, non-contradictory stance on engagement and disengagement",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the statement functions as a reflective mantra, boundary-setting tool, or literary expression within contexts valuing authentic dialogue and self-awareness",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is treated as a literal factual report of behavior rather than poetic assertion, or is invoked to project unearned moral authority without corresponding actions"
}
